name: Maldives Holiday Promotion
subject: Exclusive: {{destination}} Package for {{company}} — {{nights}}N/{{pax}}P
body:
Dear {{name}},

We are excited to present our exclusive {{destination}} package, curated especially for {{company}}.

🏝️ **{{package_name}}**
• Duration: {{nights}} nights
• Guests: {{pax}} travellers
• Starting from: {{price}} per person
• Travel Date: {{travel_date}}

This offer includes luxury accommodations, guided tours, and exclusive activities. Perfect for {{segment}} clients looking for an unforgettable experience.

Would you like us to send the detailed itinerary?

Warm regards,
[Your Name]
[DMC Name]

name: Winter Adventure Special

body:
Hi {{name}},

name: Weekly Newsletter Template
subject: Weekly Travel Updates: What's New in {{destination}}
body:
Hello {{name}},

Hope you're having a great week! Here's this week's curated travel updates:

📰 **Industry News**
- New hotel openings in {{destination}}
- Updated visa requirements
- Market trends for {{segment}} segment

🎯 **Trending Packages**
- {{package_name}} — Now available from {{price}}
- Limited slots remaining for {{travel_date}}

💡 **Travel Tips**
Best time to visit {{destination}}: [Month]
Language: [Local]

Have questions? Reply to this email or visit our website.

Happy travels!
[Your DMC Team]

name: Post-Trip Feedback
subject: How was your {{destination}} experience with {{company}}?
body:
Dear {{name}},

Thank you for choosing our services for your recent {{package_name}} trip to {{destination}}!

We'd love to hear about your experience:

⭐ [FEEDBACK SURVEY - 2 MIN]

Your feedback helps us:
• Improve our services
• Recommend activities to other clients
• Share success stories

As a thank you, respondents get 10% off their next booking.

Best regards,
[Your Name]
[Your DMC]

name: MICE Event Proposal
subject: Customized {{destination}} Event for {{company}} — {{pax}} Guests
body:
Dear {{name}},

We specialize in corporate events for companies like {{company}}.

For your {{pax}}-person event in {{destination}}:

✓ Venue sourcing & logistics
✓ Team-building activities

✓ 24/7 event coordination

Let's schedule a call to discuss your requirements.

[MICE Team]
